database_info.name: Legrand UPS & LCS Cabling Selection Theory

1_ups_topology_selection.principle: UPS topology determines protection level and transfer time

types.models: KEOR SPX, KEOR Multi Plug, KEOR LP, NIKY S
types.best_for: Workstations, NVR, PoE switches, small servers, PA amplifiers

types.models: KEOR SPE, DAKER DK, DK PLUS, KEOR Compact
types.best_for: Servers, core switches, critical NVR, sensitive equipment
Server rooms, data centers, large installations

2_ups_sizing.principle: UPS VA rating must exceed total connected load with headroom

3_runtime_extension.principle: External battery cabinets extend UPS runtime for critical loads

models.KEOR LP + Battery: Line-interactive with external battery for 1-4 hour runtime
models.DK PLUS + EBC: Online with external battery cabinet for extended runtime
models.KEOR Compact + Battery Cabinet: 3-phase with empty cabinet (fill with required batteries)

3_runtime_extension.runtime_planning: Calculate: Runtime(min) = Battery_Ah × Battery_V × Efficiency / Load_W. For 30 min runtime at 1KW load: need ~40Ah at 36V.

4_ups_for_security_systems.principle: Security systems require UPS backup for continued operation during power failure

guide.ups: KEOR SPX 1000VA (internal battery ~15min) or KEOR LP 1KVA + battery (1-4 hours)

guide.system: Full security rack (NVR + switches + access control)

guide.note: EN54 PAVA systems have dedicated EN54-4 battery backup — UPS is additional protection

5_snmp_monitoring.principle: SNMP cards enable remote UPS monitoring and automated shutdown
features: SNMP traps for NMS (Nagios, PRTG, Zabbix)
Automated server shutdown on low battery
Compatible with DAKER DK, KEOR LP, KEOR SPE, KEOR Compact

6_lcs_vs_schneider_vs_hikvision_cabling.principle: Legrand LCS is a premium structured cabling alternative

comparison.strengths: European premium brand, LSZH standard, matched ecosystem with Legrand electrical
Integrated with Schneider electrical (Unica), face plates match switches
Budget-friendly CCA option, pure copper premium option

6_lcs_vs_schneider_vs_hikvision_cabling.recommendation: For premium installations: Legrand LCS or Schneider Actassi. For budget: Hikvision OFC. Never use CCA for PoE runs >60m.

7_lcs_keystone_system.principle: Keystone modules snap into face plates and patch panels for flexible port configuration
7_lcs_keystone_system.cost_example: 24-port Cat6 UTP panel: 632850 ($18) + 24× 632909 ($42) = $60 total vs pre-loaded 033790 at $28

8_patch_cord_color_coding.principle: Legrand LCS Red LSZH patch cords available in Cat6 and Cat6A
8_patch_cord_color_coding.note: Red is useful for camera/security network color coding. Order other colors separately if needed.

9_fiber_optic.principle: Legrand OS2 fiber for inter-building backbone
9_fiber_optic.use: Campus backbone, building-to-building links. Terminate with LC connectors in fiber patch panel.

standards.scope: UPS safety, EMC, and performance classification
Power supply for intruder alarm systems
LSZH cable smoke and halogen testing
